title: Restore lost database due to Docker Windows WSL volume issue
why: Docker Desktop lost connection to Windows drive E:\ on restart, causing MySQL to boot with an empty VM volume instead of the bind-mounted mysql_data directory.
root_cause: Docker Desktop lost connection to Windows drive E:\ on restart, causing MySQL to boot with an empty VM volume instead of the bind-mounted mysql_data directory.
solution: Restored database from automatic SQL backup generated by startup.bat to provide immediate access, and instructed user to restart Docker Desktop/startup.bat to re-mount the original persistent volume.
